title: Investing in GPUs - Key demand drivers and market trends
summary:
Investing
in GPUs
Key demand drivers
and market trends
 The growth of artificial intelligence (AI),
cloud computing, and the internet of
things (IoT) is fuelling unprecedented
demand for data centres (DCs) and the
graphic processing units (GPUs) that
increasingly underpin high-performance
requirements for these technologies.
